title: 9 Herbal Teas For Menopause
description: Zingiber officinale teas contains active constituents like gingerols and shogaols, which have anti-inflammatory properties that help with menopause symptoms. These compounds work by reducing inflammation in the body, which is often linked to hot flashes, night sweats, and mood swings during menopause. The antioxidant properties of ginger help protect the body from oxidative stress, further alleviating symptoms of menopause. Ginger also helps to regulate hormones and improve digestion, ...
